title: Trilegal advises Capri Loans on ₹489 crore NCD issuance
description: Capri Global Capital Limited, dba Capri Loans, has made a public issue of non-convertible debentures aggregating to ₹489.113 crore.Trilegal advised Capri Loans and Nuvama Wealth Management Limited i.e. the lead manager, on this NCD issuance.The transaction team was led by Richa Choudhary (Partner) and Maitreya Rajurkar (Partner), with support from Avanti Kale (Counsel), Sanya Chaudhari (Senior Associate), Associates Siddhant Mishra, Shreyansh Gupta, Sakshi Nalawade and Tanushka Trivedi.Trilegal
